framework.name: AI Project Cost Ranges
framework.description: Small to medium AI projects cost $50K-$500K, while large-scale initiatives exceed $5M. Moderate complexity custom projects fall in $50K-$500K range, establishing baseline pricing for integration solutions.
framework.raw_quote: Cost Range: Small to medium AI projects: $50K-$500K; large-scale initiatives: $5M+

source.title: AI Software Development: Why 95% Of Enterprise Pilots Fail - USM
